The question is asking to determine the most recent year when she received her highest rated position. Since the "position" column contains ordinal data (2nd), we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(position) operation with the order "small to large" to see the highest rated position first. Then, we can look for the most recent year by sorting the "year" column in descending order to find the latest occurrence of the highest position.
The most recent highest rated position she received was in 2012, where she was ranked 2nd. All other years in the sub-table also show a 2nd position, but 2012 is the most recent year among them.
